h1.visual_description: Large serif font, left-aligned, typically followed by a superscript footnote reference number.

visual_matchers.pattern: Light gray shaded rectangular box with centered text
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Sidebar or callout box providing supplementary context or related links.

visual_matchers.pattern: Blue underlined text within a sidebar
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Hyperlink to internal or external resources.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small serif text at the bottom of the page starting with a number

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Superscript numeric markers in text corresponding to a numbered list at the bottom of the page.

layout_info.primary_flow: Single-column main body text with a left-aligned inset sidebar.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and section title located at the bottom margin (e.g., '48 | Types of Sources').
